title: Purpose with para que
subtitle: Say so that someone can do something.
overview: Para + infinitive when the subject is the same.
Para que + verb when another person is involved.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I study in order to improve.
Te escribo para que sepas la verdad.
I am writing to you so that you know the truth.
Lo explico para que todos entiendan.
I explain it so that everyone understands.

items.es: Te mando la dirección para que puedas llegar sin problema.
items.en: I send you the address so that you can arrive without problems.

items.es: Hablo despacio para que me entiendas.
items.en: I speak slowly so that you understand me.

items.es: Reservé temprano para que no hubiera problemas.
items.en: I booked early so that there would be no problems.

items.es: Uso ejemplos para que la gramática sea más clara.
items.en: I use examples so that the grammar is clearer.

items.es: Voy a llamarte para que no te preocupes.
items.en: I am going to call you so that you do not worry.
